case_title: BOUDREAUX, KAREN C/O BIG CITY BUSINESS FORMS VS LARA, CESAR & VILMA E DBA AUTO ANALYSTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOUDREAUX, KAREN C/O BIG CITY BUSINESS FORMS AS TO DEFENDANT LARA, CESAR & VILMA E DBA AUTO ANALYSTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOUDREAUX, KAREN C/O BIG CITY BUSINESS FORMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARA, CESAR & VILMA E DBA AUTO ANALYSTS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

POS AS TO DEFT VILMA LARA DBA AUTO ANALYSTS FILED.
